speaker: speaker1
text: Steven , shall we go shopping tomorrow ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Hum ... Why not go shopping the day after tomorrow ? Tomorrow is Saturday . I hate all the hustle and bustle of Saturday shopping .

speaker: speaker1
text: But Sunday is the same with Saturday . If you don ’ t mind , that's OK .

speaker: speaker2
text: Hum.Maybe it will be better . The most important thing is that I can have a day to relax after a week's work .

speaker: speaker1
text: I see . We will go the day after tomorrow .

speaker: speaker2
text: By the way , what kind of stores do we need to go ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I want to buy some clothes in clothing store . When we are going back , go to the butcher's shop and buy some chicken .

speaker: speaker2
text: Let ’ s also go to the jewelry store to buy a crystal necklace . I want to buy one for you as your birthday present .
